functional/dlopen_dso.reason: dlopen/dlsym not available in wasm32-wasip1 — no dynamic linking support

functional/tls_align_dso.reason: Thread-local storage with dynamic shared objects requires dlopen — not available in WASM

functional/tls_init_dso.reason: Thread-local storage initialization with DSOs requires dlopen — not available in WASM

functional/strptime.reason: strptime fails on timezone-related format specifiers (%Z, %z) — musl timezone code is ifdef'd out for WASI

regression/statvfs.reason: statvfs/fstatvfs not part of WASI — no filesystem statistics interface

regression/tls_get_new-dtv_dso.reason: TLS dynamic thread vector with DSOs requires dlopen — not available in WASM
